CreateInstanceBySpec.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password in the image. Default: false. true: use the preset password; false: do not use it. If true, password and keypairId must be empty. Only supported for custom or shared images.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bccCreateWithScript: Automation script executed when creating a BCC instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.name: VM name (optional). If specified, used as name prefix in batch creation; suffix is appended as "{name-sequence}". If not specified, auto-generated as "{instance-8charRandom-sequence}". Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -_/. symbols; must start with a letter; length 1–65.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cpuThreadConfig: Threads per physical core (vCPU), controlling whether hyper-threading is enabled. Valid values: 1, 2. Default is 2. Only supported on Intel 7th-gen+ or AMD 3rd-gen+ bare-metal instance specs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.numaConfig: CPU NUMA configuration. Intel: 0=disabled, 1=enabled. AMD: controls NPS (Nodes Per Socket); valid values: 0, 1, 2, 4, auto (NPS0–NPS4 and auto). Default: NUMA enabled (Intel) / NPS1 (AMD). Only supported on Intel 7th-gen+ or AMD 3rd-gen+ bare-metal specs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hostname: VM hostname (optional). If specified, used as hostname prefix in batch creation; suffix appended as "{name-sequence}". If not specified, auto-generated as "{instance-8charRandom-sequence}". Only lowercase letters, digits, and -. allowed; must start with a letter; no consecutive special characters; length 2–64.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostnameDomain: Whether to auto-generate hostname domain. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.adminPass: Instance administrator password. 8–32 characters, must contain at least three of: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, special characters. Allowed special characters: ()`~!@#$%^&*-_+=\|{}[]:;'<>,.?/. Must be transmitted encrypted.
CreateInstanceBySpec.keypairId: ID of the key pair to bind to the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame. Default: false. Only available for specs that support Jumbo Frame.
CreateInstanceBySpec.userData: UserData to pass to the instance. Not encrypted during API transmission; avoid plaintext secrets. Recommended to encrypt and Base64-encode before passing, then decode inside the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deletionProtection: Instance release protection. 0: disabled (default), 1: enabled. When enabled, manual release of the instance is prohibited.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTimeUnit: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; empty otherwise. Unit: "month" or "year".
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTime: Required if auto-renewal is enabled; empty otherwise. Duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–5 for yearly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hosteyeType: Host security type, effective when isOpenHostEye is true. "enterprise": enterprise edition; "open" or omitted: basic edition.
CreateInstanceBySpec.dataPartitionType: Data disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootPartitionType: System disk file system format. Options: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cdsAutoRenew: [Deprecated] Whether CDS auto-renews (now follows BCC auto-renewal setting). true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to create.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced, cloud_hp1, hp1, hdd. Default: hp1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk size in GB. Must be a positive integer, range 0–5120 GB.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsExtraIo: Extra I/O performance for the disk.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID when creating disk from a snapshot. Disk size must not be smaller than the snapshot.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.enableDeleteProtection: Enable deletion protection for the disk.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk with instance (pay-as-you-go only). Default: false. Requires cdsAttributeActive=true when releasing the instance (V2 API).
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete auto snapshots when the disk is released.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.name: Disk name.
CreateInstanceBySpec.imageId: Image ID for the instance. Obtain from the image list API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.spec: Instance spec, e.g., bcc.g7.c2m8. See the instance spec list API for available options.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidModel: Spot instance bid model. "market": market price; "custom": custom price.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidPrice: Spot instance bid price in CNY/minute. If custom bid is below market price, creation is rejected. Effective only when bidModel="custom".
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size in GB. Linux: default 20 GB, range [10, 2048]; Windows: default 40 GB, range [40, 2048]. Must meet the minimum disk size requirement of the selected image.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskExtraIo: Extra I/O performance for the root disk.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskStorageType: System disk type. Default: hp1 (high-performance cloud disk). See StorageType for options.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkCapacityInMbps: Public bandwidth in Mbps. For prepaid/bandwidth-billed EIP: standard BGP 1–500, enhanced BGP 100–5000. For traffic-billed EIP: standard BGP 1–200 (peak limit). 0 means no public IP. Default: 0.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ehcClusterId: Optional EHC cluster ID when creating a RoCE instance. Uses the default EHC cluster if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseCount: Number of instances to create in batch. Must be a positive integer. Default: 1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseMinCount: Minimum number of instances to create in batch.
CreateInstanceBySpec.dedicatedHostId: Dedicated host ID for pinning the instance to a specific host.
CreateInstanceBySpec.relationTag: Whether to apply the same tags to associated resources (CDS, EIP, snapshots, snapshot chains). Default: false.
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems: List of CFS file systems to mount on the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems.protocol: CFS file system protocol. Options: nfs, smb.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks: Local disk configuration. DCC instances support multiple local disks with specified type and size. Other BCC types support at most one local disk with default type; size must be specified. FPGA and GPU instances use one local disk sized per configuration.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks.storageType: Local disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced, cloud_hp1, hp1, hdd. Default: hp1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupId: [Deprecated] Security group ID. Uses the default security group if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs. Uses the default security group if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs. If non-empty, securityGroupIds is ignored. Uses the default security group if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.subnetId: Subnet ID. Uses the default subnet if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployId: Deployment set ID for the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployIdList: List of deployment set IDs for the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.eniIds: List of ENI short IDs to attach. In batch creation, ENIs are evenly distributed across instances; the total count must be an integer multiple of the instance count, and per-instance ENI count must not exceed the instance limit. Not supported on EBC bare-metal instances. Maximum 5000 ENI IDs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.disableRootDiskSerial: Whether to hide the system disk serial number. Default: false. true: hide, false: show.
CreateInstanceBySpec.zoneName: Availability zone name, e.g., "cn-bj-a" for Beijing Zone A. See the zone list API. Not required for dedicated instances.
CreateInstanceBySpec.resGroupId: Resource group ID to bind to the instance.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the postpaid EIP is automatically released with the instance. Default: false. Only effective for bandwidth- or traffic-billed EIPs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkPurchaseType: EIP line type. Options: BGP (standard), BGP_S (enhanced). Default: BGP.
CreateInstanceBySpec.instanceType: Instance type. See InstanceType for options. Uses the default type if empty.
CreateInstanceBySpec.internetChargeType: Public bandwidth billing method. See internetChargeType for options. Default follows BCC billing: prepaid defaults to monthly/yearly bandwidth billing; postpaid defaults to bandwidth-usage billing.
CreateInstanceBySpec.eipName: Public IP name. 1–65 characters, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, -_/. Auto-generated if not specified.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. true: enable, false: disable. Default: enabled.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableHt: Whether to enable HT (hyper-threading) for EBC instances. Default: true.
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method. Options: Prepaid, Postpaid, bidding.
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.reservation: Reservation info. Required for prepaid; not needed for postpaid.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 for the instance. Requires both image and subnet to support IPv6. true: enable, false: disable. If omitted, auto-adapts based on image and subnet IPv6 support.
